title: Opportunity finds me ready
subtitle: A short affirmation for meeting good opportunities with clarity instead of hesitation.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 35 of the MONEY program. One statement for replacing the delay reflex with a felt sense of readiness.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 35 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you want to anchor the opportunity-readiness work from the tapping or energy statement practices.

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 35 of the MONEY program. One statement, repeated until it settles.
Say it three times in the morning, slow. Hand on chest if useful. Let the word 'ready' land rather than rushing past it.
Adapted from Day 35 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
